subtitle.simple: Import a model from a URI — auto-detect picks the backend.
subtitle.powerYaml: Write the full model YAML configuration.

form.uriHint: Enter the URI or path to the model file you want to import
form.customKeyValueHint: Add custom key-value pairs for advanced configuration.
form.backendHint: Force a specific backend. Leave empty to auto-detect from the URI. Items marked "manual pick" aren't auto-detectable — pick them yourself if you know what the model needs.
form.backendErrorHint: Could not load backend list — auto-detect only.
form.backendNotInstalled: This backend isn't installed yet. Submitting import will download it first.
form.modelNameHint: Custom name for the model. If empty, the filename will be used.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default description
form.quantizationsHint: Preferred quantizations (comma-separated). Leave empty for default (q4_k_m).
form.mmprojQuantizationsHint: Preferred MMProj quantizations. Leave empty for default (fp16).
form.embeddingsHint: Enable embeddings support for this model.
form.modelTypeHint: Model type for transformers backend. Examples: AutoModelForCausalLM, SentenceTransformer, Mamba.
form.schedulerTypeHint: Scheduler type for diffusers backend. Examples: k_dpmpp_2m, euler_a, ddim.
form.cudaHint: Enable CUDA support for GPU acceleration.
form.manualPickTooltip: Auto-detect won't route to this backend. Pick it here if you know that's what you want.

switchDialog.title: Keep your custom preferences?
switchDialog.body: Switching to Simple mode hides preferences beyond backend, name, and description. They'll still be sent when you import.

toasts.backendsLoadFailed: Could not load backend list — using auto-detect only
toasts.modalityClearedBackend: Cleared backend selection — it wasn't in the {{label}} group.

http.title: HTTP/HTTPS URLs
http.direct: Direct download from any HTTPS URL
